refnamediv.refpurpose: Drops a table and all its references in geometry_columns.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Drops a table and all its references in geometry_columns. Note: uses current_schema() on schema-aware pgsql installations if schema is not provided.

note.para: Changed: 2.0.0 This function is provided for backward compatibility. Now that since geometry_columns is now a view against the system catalogs, you can drop a table with geometry columns like any other table using DROP TABLE

refsection.title: Examples
